app.name: FigureShot Lab
app.footer: FigureShot Lab — shoot what you collect.

landing.question: What do you want to shoot today?

hero.title: Turn your figure collection into cinematic photo ideas.

s2.title: Pick figures like choosing your heroes.
s2.sub: Pair rivals, form squads, or cross universes.

s3.title: Scene, mood, caption — ready to post.
s3.sub: Your photo plan and your post, generated together.

pinned.l1: A collection shouldn't just sit on a shelf.
pinned.l2: Every figure has a story no one has shot yet.

cards.c1: Overtime at the End of the World

showcase.label: Community shots
showcase.title: Your shots, your stage.
showcase.desc: Turn generated ideas into real photos, then share them with the world.

story1.title: Pick figures like choosing your heroes.
story1.desc: Browse your own collection as a character roster. Pair rivals, form squads, or cross universes — the tension starts before the shutter.

story2.title: Spin up scenes, moods, and missions.
story2.desc: Lock your leads, randomize the rest. Get a scene, an emotion, and a task that turn shelf figures into a story waiting to be shot.

story3.title: From setup to caption, ready to post.
story3.desc: Posing tips, lighting hints, and social-ready captions with hashtags — your photo plan and your post, generated together.

spin.title: Feeling lucky?
spin.subtitle: Spin the wheel and let your collection surprise you with today's pairing.

generator.crossoverHint: Crossover picks figures from different series for unexpected pairings.

detail.demoNote: Demo details — real data comes from your collection.

generator.demoNote: Preview build: placeholder figures and static results. Real collection & AI generation land after the PRE gates.

result.demoTitle: Overtime at the End of the World
result.tip1: Low angle from tabletop level; let the skyline gradient fill the background.
result.tip2: Key light from the left at 45°, warm tone; a phone flashlight works.
result.tip3: Put the taller figure slightly behind for depth; focus on the front face.
result.caption: Caption
result.demoNote: Save & share activate once accounts and the collection API are wired up.

share.demoNote: Preview build: this share page shows demo content until saved inspirations go live.

empty.title: No figures match
empty.desc: Try another filter, or add your first figure.
